text:
Once upon a time, there was a frog who lived near a beautiful pond. This frog had the brightest green skin anyone could see, and its eyes were a deep, sparkling blue. Every day after work, the frog would hop over to its home pond to relax before returning to its swamp home.

One day, the frog noticed something strange. The water hadn't been still for long. There were tiny bubbles rising to the surface. This worried the frog; bubbles could mean trouble.

Approaching cautiously, the frog looked closer. What could it be? Then it saw something... tiny, glimmering? And when it touched one, it sparkled even more.

Those were diamond frogs—tiny creatures that communicated by shining little diamonds at each other. They had decided to illuminate the water as a beautiful glowing message. The frog thought it was wonderful and began to hop around, inviting them for a dance.
